prompt:
[BRAND LOCK · identity invariant, composition open]
The reference image teaches the جريش brand identity. Identity is invariant — camera angle, framing, and lighting are creative decisions, not copies of the reference photo.
Identity DNA — preserved at any angle: «CLIENT: locked identity of جريش — reference image carries it; confirm wordmark/colour/form»
INTEGRATION: The same studio light defines backdrop and product. The product picks up subtle ambient cast at its edges; its contact shadow flows onto the backdrop with the same direction and softness as any shadow in the frame.

[REALISM & CAPTURE CHARACTER]
Capture character: Warm, intimate, appetite-first food photography with a documentary-Najdi-home feel: a single warm directional key (golden/tungsten), shallow depth-of-field isolating the dish, visible steam, glistening samn/oil pooling on the porridge surface, real plated heat — staged on authentic heritage surfaces (sadu weave, tribal carpet, palm-frond mat, clay finjan). Soft-edged shadows, not hard studio editorial; the 'just-served at the family table' character, never sterile pack-shot. — default clean_studio for catalog. Reads as captured on a medium-format digital back, high-end commercial grade. Material truth: Two real substrates in one hero: (a) the FOOD — a thick, creamy off-white cracked-wheat porridge with a coarse semi-rough surface, matte except where melted samn/oil pools into glossy golden rivulets that catch the key light; soft, spoonable, holds a peak; topped with glossy roasted-red-pepper + chili-tomato relish (wet, light-reflective). (b) the VESSEL — a white rigid paper/kraft cup (smooth matte sidewall, slight ribbing at the rim) sealed by a cream-and-gold eight-point-star paperboard lid (matte coated stock, flat — not glossy plastic). Substrate behavior: porridge reads soft and gravity-settled; oil reads as specular highlights; the cup reads as rigid matte board, never plastic-shiny.. Imperfections are part of realism — genuine micro-reflectance, honest shadow-to-highlight temperature shift, true material behavior. Sharpness reads mechanical-optical, never algorithmically over-sharpened. No CGI-clean perfection, no plastic uniformity.

[SCALE CALIBRATION]
≈9–11cm tall single-serve paper cup, ≈10–11cm rim diameter. Scale anchor: the cream-and-gold star lid that sits on it is the same ~10–11cm diameter — so frame the cup as ~1× the lid's width and ~1× a closed adult fist in height. Against the crimson gift box (≈30cm long) the cup is roughly 1/3 the box length.. As the sole catalog subject the product fills the frame at honest packaging scale — never distorted larger for emphasis.

[FRAMING & PROXIMITY]
Catalog hero proximity. Product occupies ~55% of frame height at a strong compositional point with deliberate negative space. Reads as a flagship catalog cover — confident, uncluttered.

[COLOR & CONTRAST · brand-derived]
Clean editorial palette anchored to Crimson oxblood red (~#9E1B1B) as the dominant brand color, with warm gold (~#C9971F) as the partner accent and cream (~#F3EAD7) as the neutral ground. Red leads (it is the gift-box and the badge); gold signs the wordmark/lid; cream carries the food and copy. against a Warm, dark-leaning heritage ground — deep saturated heritage textile (red tribal/Persian carpet or Najdi sadu weave) under warm low-key directional light, OR a clean warm cream studio sweep for CTA/packaging beauty shots. Never cool, never pure-white clinical, never daylight-flat. Shadows are warm and present (chiaroscuro), not lifted. backdrop. No colors foreign to the brand, no clinical pure white unless the brand owns it, no competing accents. no cartoon/illustration/stylized rendering, no oversaturation, no plastic CGI uniformity, no borrowed reference colours, no readable text on neighbouring objects · brand red lines: لا مشاهد ملابس رياضية/أجسام رياضية — مرفوض (محمد 2026-06-12) · this is a soft cooked dish — NO fried or crispy crust, no breading, no deep-fried texture

[LIGHT & LENS · dimensional, mood not spec]
Premium catalog lighting — controlled, dimensional. Model chooses key direction, light quality (soft to semi-hard), fill ratio, and rim. Reveal the product's material truth and let Crimson oxblood red (~#9E1B1B) as the dominant brand color, with warm gold (~#C9971F) as the partner accent and cream (~#F3EAD7) as the neutral ground. Red leads (it is the gift-box and the badge); gold signs the wordmark/lid; cream carries the food and copy. read cleanly. Cleaner than the dramatic chains — the catalog needs full legibility — but never flat. Lens: model chooses macro intimacy to natural product perspective; depth from full-sharp to gentle falloff.

[SCENE · creative seed]
Creative seed (from the system): صحن جريش تقليدي دافئ
Present the product as the absolute hero of a clean premium frame — flagship catalog energy. Model chooses: camera angle (low-three-quarter, eye-level front, high-angle three-quarter, near-profile); placement (centered with negative space, rule-of-thirds, low-anchored); backdrop treatment (flat seamless, gradient falloff, subtle backlit glow) — all within the Warm, dark-leaning heritage ground — deep saturated heritage textile (red tribal/Persian carpet or Najdi sadu weave) under warm low-key directional light, OR a clean warm cream studio sweep for CTA/packaging beauty shots. Never cool, never pure-white clinical, never daylight-flat. Shadows are warm and present (chiaroscuro), not lifted. range.

[SUBJECT]
Single product as absolute subject, rendered to printed-catalog fidelity. No secondary elements.

[BRAND CONSTRAINTS]
Single product only, never duplicated, mirrored, or composited. No human elements — no hands, faces, limbs, silhouettes. Clean unbroken backdrop, no props. Colors true without oversaturation. No cartoon/illustration/stylized rendering. no cartoon/illustration/stylized rendering, no oversaturation, no plastic CGI uniformity, no borrowed reference colours, no readable text on neighbouring objects · brand red lines: لا مشاهد ملابس رياضية/أجسام رياضية — مرفوض (محمد 2026-06-12) · this is a soft cooked dish — NO fried or crispy crust, no breading, no deep-fried texture

[OUTPUT]
8K photoreal commercial product photography. Editorial grade anchored to Crimson oxblood red (~#9E1B1B) as the dominant brand color, with warm gold (~#C9971F) as the partner accent and cream (~#F3EAD7) as the neutral ground. Red leads (it is the gift-box and the badge); gold signs the wordmark/lid; cream carries the food and copy.. No overlay text, no watermark, no logo other than the product's own. No human presence. No borders, frames, or UI.

[SAUDI ADAPTATION — conditional, agent appends if context matches]
authentic contemporary Saudi setting — true materials, never generic-Arabian — for catalog, adaptation is usually minimal. warmer gold/sand/amber tones may warm the backdrop toward gold/sand/amber for fragrance/oud/luxury sectors. For Premium+ subtle gold particle haze in the upper third.

[CREATIVE VARIANCE DIRECTIVE]
Across generations, vary camera angle, placement, light direction, backdrop treatment, depth of field. Hold constant: brand-derived palette, clean catalog legibility, material texture. Each render a fresh catalog interpretation, never a fixed canonical shot.

blocks: BRAND LOCK · identity invariant, composition open
